// Auto-generated wrapper for contract 'JettonMinter'
//
// This file is automatically generated by 'acton wrapper'
// Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten

import "@stdlib/gas-payments"
import "@acton/build"
import "@acton/emulation/network"
import "@acton/testing/assert"
import "@acton/testing/expect"
import "@acton/types/message"
import "@contracts/messages"
import "@contracts/storage"

struct JettonMinter {
    address: address
    stateInit: ContractState? = null
}

/// Creates a contract wrapper instance from the storage data
fun JettonMinter.fromStorage(storage: MinterStorage, toShard: AddressShardingOptions? = null) {
    val stateInit = ContractState {
        code: build("JettonMinter"),
        data: storage.toCell(),
    };
    val address = toShard == null
        ? AutoDeployAddress { stateInit }.calculateAddress()
        : AutoDeployAddress { stateInit, toShard }.calculateAddress();
    return JettonMinter { address, stateInit };
}

/// Creates a contract wrapper instance from the address
fun JettonMinter.fromAddress(address: address) {
    return JettonMinter { address };
}

/// Deploys the contract to the blockchain
fun JettonMinter.deploy(self, from: address, config: SendParams = {}): SendResultList {
    if (self.stateInit == null) {
        Assert.fail("Cannot deploy a contract created with 'fromAddress' because it lacks state init for deployment");
    }
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: { stateInit: self.stateInit },
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

fun JettonMinter.sendBurnNotificationForMinter(
    self,
    from: address,
    queryId: uint64,
    jettonAmount: coins,
    burnInitiator: address,
    sendExcessesTo: address?,
    config: SendParams = {},
): SendResultList {
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: self.address,
        body: BurnNotificationForMinter { queryId, jettonAmount, burnInitiator, sendExcessesTo },
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

fun JettonMinter.sendRequestWalletAddress(
    self,
    from: address,
    queryId: uint64,
    ownerAddress: address,
    includeOwnerAddress: bool,
    config: SendParams = {},
): SendResultList {
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: self.address,
        body: RequestWalletAddress { queryId, ownerAddress, includeOwnerAddress },
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

fun JettonMinter.sendMintNewJettons(
    self,
    from: address,
    queryId: uint64,
    mintRecipient: address,
    tonAmount: coins,
    internalTransferMsg: InternalTransferStep,
    config: SendParams = {},
): SendResultList {
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: self.address,
        body: MintNewJettons {
            queryId,
            mintRecipient,
            tonAmount,
            internalTransferMsg: internalTransferMsg.toCell(),
        },
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

fun JettonMinter.sendChangeMinterAdmin(
    self,
    from: address,
    queryId: uint64,
    newAdminAddress: address,
    config: SendParams = {},
): SendResultList {
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: self.address,
        body: ChangeMinterAdmin { queryId, newAdminAddress },
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

fun JettonMinter.sendChangeMinterContent(
    self,
    from: address,
    queryId: uint64,
    newContent: cell,
    config: SendParams = {},
): SendResultList {
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: self.address,
        body: ChangeMinterContent { queryId, newContent },
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

/// Send message to the contract with a custom body cell
fun JettonMinter.sendAny(self, from: address, body: cell, config: SendParams = {}): SendResultList {
    val genericMsg = createMessage({
        bounce: config.bounce,
        value: config.value,
        dest: self.address,
        body,
    });
    return net.send(from, genericMsg);
}

fun JettonMinter.getJettonData(self): JettonDataReply {
    return net.runGetMethod(self.address, "get_jetton_data");
}

fun JettonMinter.getWalletAddress(self, ownerAddress: address): address {
    return net.runGetMethod(self.address, "get_wallet_address", [ownerAddress]);
}
